title: elatostema integrifolium var. integrifolium
intro: Elatostema integrifolium var. integrifolium, also known as the entire-leaved Elatostema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elatostema integrifolium var. integrifolium include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea, or used in tincture form to extract its medicinal compounds.
